title: Tender Toasted Egyptian Banana Fritters
description: A kid-friendly Egyptian dish featuring fried ripe bananas with a fluffy and funky texture, finished to a perfect al-dente bite, and a Mediterranean-friendly flavor profile.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the sliced bananas to the egg mixture and toss to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Dip each banana slice into the flour mixture, then the egg mixture, and finally the flour mixture again.
Fry the banana slices in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the fried banana slices to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small bowl, mix together the honey and sesame seeds.
Drizzle the honey and sesame seed mixture over the fried banana slices and serve warm.
